titleStmt.title: SII 11.139: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 139. (B.K. No. 90 of 1929-30.) HEBBĀḶ, BĀGEVĀḌI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB STANDING NEAR THE MALLIKĀRJUNA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and is interesting on account of the mention of the king's son and crown prince Yuvarāja Mallikārjunadēva, who was governing over the Tardavāḍi Thousand province as tribhōg-ābhyantara-siddhi. It registers a gift of land made by the prince, at the request of his subordinate Mahāsāmantādhipati, Daṇḍanāyaka, Bhīvaṇayya, to the temple of the goddess Sarasvatī. The gift was made into the hands of Chandraśēkhara Paṇḍita, the āchārya of the maṭha in the temple of Svayaṁbhu Dakshiṇa-Sōmanātha at Perbbāḷ, the chief among the Twelve (villages).

The inscription is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 20, Yuva, Paushya, ba. 11, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, which corresponds to A.D. 1095, December 24, Monday, on which day the saṅkrānti actually commenced.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvī
rājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatṛbhuva
namalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi pra
varddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire śrīrā
jadhāni kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁ
kathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tattanayaṁ svasti
samastabhuvanasaṁstūyamānakīrttikaumudīdhavaḷi
tadigaṁtarāḷaṁ rājanyamauḷi virājita cāḷukyakuḷa
kumudasamudayānaṁdacaṁdraṁ vibhevāmarēṁdraṁ ripu
rāyakumarakuḷakudharakuḷiśadaṇḍaṁ rājamārttaṇḍa
māḷavabaḷabaḷāhakasemi raṇaṁ vijayalakṣmībha
vanamaṇitōraṇaṁ śastraśāstravidyāvidyādharaṁ rājyala
kṣmīdharaṁ bappana siṁgaṁ sāhasōttuṁga nāmādi sa
mastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmadyuvarāja mallikā
rjjunadēvar tarddavāḍi sāyiramumaṁ tṛbhōgābhyaṁtarasiddhi
yināḷuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhi
gatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpra
caṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ nītinitaṁbinīkusumasāyakaṁ viprakuḷa
kumudakaumudīviḷāsaṁ kīrttilakṣmīnivāsaṁ saujanyavanajavanamā
rttaṇḍaṁ nuḍidantegaṇḍaṁ niyōgayōgaṁdharaṁ samaradhuraṁdharaṁ kā
śmīraviṣayamukhamaṇḍanaṁ svāmidrōhaśiraskhaṇḍanaṁ śrī
mattṛbhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhṛṁgaṁ guṇagaṇōttuṁgaṁ nāmādi
samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhā
naṁ sahavāsigaḷadhiṣṭhāyakaṁ pattaḷe karaṇaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ
bhīvaṇayyaṁgaḷa binnapadi navadhārisi śrīmadyuvarājaṁ
mallikārjjunadēvar śrīmaccāḷukyavikramava
rṣada 20 neya yuva saṁvatsarada pauṣya bahuḷa
11 sōmavāradaṁdi nuttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti parbbanimi
ttadiṁ panneraḍaṟa modala bāḍa perbbāḷa śrīsvayaṁbhu da
kṣiṇasōmanāthadēvara maṭhadācāryyar . ṁ .
śrī śāntarāśipaṇḍitaravara śiṣyarccaṁdraśēkharapaṇḍi
tara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi sarasvatīdēvi
ge sirimalaṁgeya baṭṭeyiṁ paḍuva svayaṁbhudēva
ra poladiṁ teṁka liṁgaḷēśvarada ya kōlagaḍiṁ
[badoḷ . kaṁda]
vipratatigadhi
nūṟumattar
yō harēta vasundharāṁ vi
ṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē k®
suṁgaḷu mūroḍeyaru mahājanamuṁ
rakṣisuvar [.]
Digital edition of SII 11.139 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
